measurement_note: Size is k, with n=2k. The Accepted multiplicative binomial formula and an independent factorial/inverse-factorial implementation take O(k+log M) time. A correct Pascal-table implementation computes the same coefficient in O(k^2), completes all k=8/32/128 tiers, and is rejected only by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: choose 16 transformed endpoints for k=8
benchmark: choose 64 transformed endpoints for k=32
benchmark: choose 256 transformed endpoints for k=128
